title: Weird Ways to Die
description: A mod that adds weird ways to die
body:
# Notice

I, Jackie The Coder, quit modding. Because no one thanks me enough or support me to feel like I have made what i should have.

If you wish to have my mods, sorry but you have to support me on patreon or Ko-fi once it's ready.


# Additions
This mod adds "realistic" ways to die.
# What It Includes
It includes plastic wrap associated deaths & exhaustion, learn more in game! Items include titestretch, tite stretch sheet, plastic wrap helmet. We use achievements to see how far you've gone on the world.
# APIS?
BetterDeathAPI
